mapper.sql: id, user_id, category_id, front_content, back_content, note, source_type, source_pack_id, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_knowledge_card WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_knowledge_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_knowledge_card WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_knowledge_card (user_id, category_id, front_content, back_content, note, source_type, source_pack_id, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{frontContent}, #{backContent}, #{note}, #{sourceType}, #{sourcePackId}, #{isDeleted})
